verses.text: Tua hi a, eite in i kiim i pamah hih zahin a tam teci nei ihih ciangin eite a hong dongtangsak thei nate khempeuh leh eite a hong gakcip mawhna leh khialhnate khempeuh paikhia-in, i mai-ah a om taina ding lampi a mong dongin lungsim kiptakin tai ni

Eite hong makai-in i upna a hong cingtaaksak Jesuh mitsuan'in nei ni. Mailamah a ngahding lungdamna hangin maizumna kihta loin singlamteh tungah sihna hong thuak a, tu-in Pasian tokhom taklamah a tu hi
Tua zahta-in mawhnei mite' langbawlna a thuaknate ngaihsun un la, note lungkia loin khauhtakin om un
Tu ciangdong mawhna tawh na kidona uhah sihna zah ciangdongin na dona uh om nailo hi

Pasian in note, tate, hong ci-in hong hanthotna thu mangngilh khinta na hi uh hiam? Pasian in note kiangah, “Ka ta aw, Topa' hong thuhilhna zangkhai ngaihsut kei in la, gim a hong piak ciangin lungkia kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a it mite thuhilh a, ta taktakin a ngaihsut mite a taii hi,” hong ci hi
Pasian' hong thuhilhna na thuakding mah uh ahi hi. Pasian in note ta-in hong ngaihsun ahih manin a thuak na hi uh hi. Pate' thuhilhna leh taiina a thuaklo ta kuamah omlo hi
Tate' thuak bangin thuhilhna leh taiina thuakloin hong kikoih mawk leh ta taktak hiloin zawlta na hi lel ding uh hi
Tua banah, i leitung pate in gim hong pia a, zong i zahtak lai hi. Tua ahih leh kha thu tawh kisai-ah i Pa' thu mang phazaw-in i nuntak ding kisam hi

I leitung pate in amau' hoihsak bangin nuntak tomno sung ngaihsutna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia a, ahi zongin Pasian in amah tawh kibangin siangtho-in i omtheihna dingin eite hong khualna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi
Thuhilhna tawh gim hong kipiak ciangin nuam kisa hetloin na kisa mahmah sam a, ahi zongin tua thuhilhna a mangzote in thuman nuntakna hangin nopsakna thaman a nung ngah uh hi.
Tua ahih ciangin a zaw nuangnuang na khutte uh leh a no dakdak na khukte uh khauhsak un
Bai luangluangin a paite, na guh na taang uh a kipelhlohna dingin lampi tang zui-in na pai un
Mi khempeuh tawh na kilem theihna ding uh hanciam un. Nuntak siangtholo tawh kuamah in Topa mu zolo ding ahih manin nuntak siangtho na nungta un
Pasian' hehpihna a ngahlah na hihkhak lohna dingun na kidawm un. Zungkha a nei singkung hong khangin mi tampi gimsakin a siatsak bangin mite a siasak na hihkhak lohna dingun na kidawm un
Numei tawh a mawh mite suakkha kei un la, Esau bangin annek khat tawh innluah za a zuak mi na suahkhak lohna dingun kidawm un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Esau in a pa kiang panin thupha ngahkik nuamin khitui naptui tawh a nget hangin a gamtatnasa a bawlkik theihna ding lampi om nawnlo ahih manin bangmah ngahthei tuan nawnlo hi
Israel mite in a tuahsa bangin note in Sinai Mual tunga meikuang, khuamial leh lungzin'na, huihpi
peengkul tumna awging leh a kihtakhuai awgingte na za nai kei uh hi. Israel mite in awging a zak uh ciangin kihta lua uh ahih manin a zakkik nawnlohna dingun a thum uh hi
“Ganhing nangawn in tua mual a sukkhak leh kidenglum ding hi,” ci ahih manin thuakngap lo uh hi
Tua pen naklauhuai mahmah ahih manin Moses in zong, “Lau-in ka ling hi,” a na ci hi
Ahi zongin note pen Zion Mual, a nungta Pasian' khuapi, vantung Jerusalem, simzawhloh vantung mite a omna
vantungah a min a kikhum Pasian' ta upate a kikhopna, mi khempeuhte' thu a khen Pasian' kiang, a cingtaakin a kibawl midikte' kha a omna
thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm Jesuh kiang, Abel' sisan sangin thu hoihzaw a gen sisan a kithehna mun na tungzo uh hi

Tua ahih manin note tungah thu a hong genpa' thugen na ngaihloh khakding uh kidawm un. Hih leitungah thu a genpa' thu a ngailote suaktalo ahih manin vantung panin thu a hong genpa' thugen ngai kei lehang i suakta kei zaw kan lai ding hi
Tuahun lai-in thu a gen ciangin leitung kiling a, ahi zongin tu-in amah in thu hong ciam a, “Leitung bek lingsak loin vantung tawh zong khatvei ka lingsak lai ding hi,” hong ci hi
“Khat vei lingsak kik lai ding,” a cih ciangin a kipiangsak nate kilingsakin kipaikhia ding a, a kilingsaklo nate kip lai ding ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi
Tua ahih manin a kilingsak zolo Pasian' gam i ngah manin lungdamin, zahtakna leh lamdangsakna tawh Pasian' lungkimna bangin amah bia ni
Bang hang hiam cih leh eite' Pasian pen a kangtum thei meikuang tawh a kibang ahi hi.
